/usr/bin/ar qc libwhale.a CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/camera/basic_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/camera/controllable_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/camera/freecam_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/framework/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/framework/input_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/graphics/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/graphics/shader_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/graphics/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/graphics/texture_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/procedural/uv_sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/terrain/basic_terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/core/terrain/triangle_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/application_opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/basic_shader_opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/compute_shader_opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/fragment_shader_opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/shader_program_opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/whale.dir/platform/opengl/vertex_shader_opengl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libwhale.a
